Petition Of Kate Jeffery Stoia To Be Appointed Co-Trustee Of The 2008 Restated Declaration Of Trust-Jeffery Kate Stoia Trust With A Non-Corporate Co-Trustee; And Appointed Guardian Of Ella Maoz For Cutma Account Created By Deceased Settlor
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Helene Wenzel for Kate Stoia (Petitioner).

The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order). Status of filing of the First Account was set for February 25, 2011. Kate Stoia was appointed custodian of the blocked account at Vanguard.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
